title: Klaus
tmdbOverview: A selfish postman and a reclusive toymaker form an unlikely friendship, delivering joy to a cold, dark town that desperately needs it.
synopsis: Klaus is a 2019 animation, family and comedy film from Spain. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.2 on IMDb. A standout of 2010s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a PG certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
